description: Create a weekly GitHub Actions workflow that runs every Sunday at 1400 UTC. The workflow should have two jobs: darglint and build_posix. The darglint job runs on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.8, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs nox darglint. The build_posix job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with Python 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, and 3.9-dev, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs nox with specific versions.
